name: Night Shift Command Room
subtitle: Focus sharpens in the dark.
completionText: You learned how to steer momentum without wasting it.
guideIntroLine: This room listens best when everything else goes quiet.

transformationStages.name: Dark Ops
transformationStages.description: Dark ops room with small tactical panels and limited visibility. Status lights blink in silence.

transformationStages.name: Night Command
transformationStages.description: Full night-ops command center with reactive displays and synchronized stations.

transformationStages.name: War Room
transformationStages.description: High-focus war room with flowing data streams, tactical overlays, and responsive room pulse.

secrets.title: The Endurance Signal
secrets.description: Certain events only occur after prolonged uninterrupted play.
secrets.hint: Stay focused. Don't break the session.

secrets.title: Night Channels
secrets.description: Night reveals channels the day ignores.
secrets.hint: The guide speaks about hidden frequencies after dark.

secrets.title: The Last Monitor
secrets.description: One monitor stays active after all others dim.
secrets.hint: Watch the screens when everything else sleeps.

midSceneTwist.title: Night Mode Pulse
midSceneTwist.description: The room gains a night mode pulse that changes timing-based systems.
midSceneTwist.effectDescription: A pulsing rhythm appears. Actions aligned to the pulse gain massive multipliers.

events.title: Blackout Sequence
events.description: All lights cut. In the darkness, the system runs a perfect diagnostic.

events.title: Alert Sweep
events.description: A sweep of alerts resolves into clear status. The brief tension creates focus.

events.title: Focus Window
events.description: External noise drops to zero. A perfect focus window opens for timed actions.

events.title: Signal Cleanse
events.description: Noise filters engage. Signal quality improves across all channels.

events.title: Midnight Sync
events.description: All systems sync at the stroke of midnight. The alignment creates a burst of coordinated output.

events.title: Console Cascade
events.description: Console commands cascade through connected terminals. Each one amplifies the next.

events.title: Command Pulse
events.description: A command pulse travels through the room. Systems that respond gain efficiency.

events.title: Shift Bonus
events.description: The shift clock ticks over. Sustained operation earns a discipline reward.

events.title: Ghost Operator Ping
events.description: A terminal receives a ping from an operator that doesn't exist on any roster.
events.flavorText: Someone else worked this shift before.

events.title: Zero-Light Precision Window
events.description: All lights fail. In total darkness, the system achieves impossible precision.
events.flavorText: The dark does not hinder what was built to see.

events.title: Hidden Console Unlock
events.description: A console panel slides open, revealing controls that respond to no known command set.
events.flavorText: This console was built for a shift that hasn't happened yet.

midTwistEvents.title: Night Shift Command Room Awakening
midTwistEvents.description: The twist in Night Shift Command Room unlocks new possibilities.

roomLaw.name: Law of Rhythm
roomLaw.description: Rhythm and streak discipline are rewarded
roomLaw.mechanic: Consecutive timed actions multiply bonuses; broken streaks reset momentum

landmark.name: The Command Console
landmark.description: A battered desk that evolves into a war room nerve center
evolutionStages: A scratched metal desk with a single dim lamp
Monitors flicker to life showing system status feeds
A tactical display table replaces the old desk
Holographic situation maps float above the console
The Command Console orchestrates operations across all sectors

hazard.name: System Fatigue
hazard.triggerCondition: Subsystems left unattended for extended periods
hazard.penalty: Directive output decreases by 10% per neglected subsystem

stabilizer.name: Routine Maintenance
stabilizer.description: Regular maintenance cycles prevent system decay
stabilizer.mechanic: Performing maintenance actions on a schedule prevents fatigue accumulation

completionCeremony: The command panels dim to a satisfied glow. Every system waits in perfect readiness.
midSceneTwistLine: The systems are responding to rhythm now. Not just command.

completionReward.relicEffect: Enhances streak-based rewards and active-session bonuses in future rooms

transitionIn.visual: Room enters from blackout. Only interface strips and status lights appear first.
transitionIn.audio: Deep midnight tone with distant console beeps
transitionIn.titleReveal: Title reveals with a midnight-blue pulse

transitionOut.visual: All displays go dark except one. That final screen becomes a tunnel of light.
transitionOut.audio: Single sustained note opening into warmth
transitionOut.titleReveal: Tunnel opens into the next room's living motion

codexAdditions.title: Shift Archive
codexAdditions.content: Logs of every night shift session and the streaks maintained within them.

codexAdditions.title: Precision Is a Kind of Faith
codexAdditions.content: It trusted us to be consistent. We learned not to waste that.

codexAdditions.title: The Console That Wakes at Midnight
codexAdditions.content: One console only activates when all others are dark.

codexAdditions.title: The Room That Preferred Silence
codexAdditions.content: It performed best when no one was talking.
